target: 6. Regrouping and Situation Report
(Noon, July 23rd... The team that had split into two regrouped, and reported the situation to each other.)
(To conclude, the only ones we were able to defeat were the shadows of Hitobuchi-sensei and her two sons--who had transformed into those children.)
(At the Kogaito house, only stains were left behind, and although we tracked them using Roz and Gil's 'noses', the presence broke off and we couldn't discover the shadows.)
(After that, with Totsumura-san leading, we also investigated the real houses of the shadows we defeated in the gym battle.)
(All of them were completely empty, but...)
(All the families had told people around them reasons for disappearing, such as 'traveling' or 'business trips', so it hadn't caused a commotion.)
I asked the people around there, but...
For example, the Kobayakawa family supposedly told people they went back to Asako-chan's older brother's place in Kainan for Shiori-chan to recuperate.
By the way, I confirmed with that brother's family, and there is no such fact!
In the 1st loop, the shadow Totsumura-san said the Kobayakawa family fled in the night due to debt...
Debt!? I've never heard of them having debt!?
So the shadows are fabricating random reasons...
They're taking preemptive measures so it won't cause a commotion even if they are exterminated and erased by us. Probably in order to hold tomorrow's summer festival without a hitch.
There are no signs of them attacking us. I wonder if they're afraid of Ushio-san's hacking after all.
Those bastards... They might not show their tails to us anymore...
What they hate the most is the festival being canceled, huh... Can't we somehow get it canceled?
I know! Like blowing up the venue with firework gunpowder!!
I told you to stop with that kind of stuff!!
A commotion bordering on terrorism is bad... Hundreds of people would panic and it'd probably cause secondary disasters, and we wouldn't be able to predict what they'd do next...
But... I agree with canceling it.
Hm...
In order to do that... We have no choice but to meet with him after all.
That comes with considerable danger.
I'm prepared for that.
What are we going to do? Should we all charge in at once?
No... first I'll go alone and try to persuade him.
Go alone...? And persuade him!?
I'm against it. If Shide exposes his real body, we have to pull the trigger without thinking...!!
I will kill him.
Please wait!!! Just once... give me just one chance!!
I just want to know what he's thinking.
If I don't know what's on his mind, then I can't kill him...!!
Why did he kill my parents... I want to hear the reason from his own mouth! Otherwise I can't accept it...!!
You're saying you'll risk danger for that!?
If it's for that!!! Dying once... is nothing!!
I'm coming with you! Shinpei, you can't sense the presence of shadows, right.
If the shrine is full of shadows lying in wait, there'll be no chance to talk!
Ushio's right.
If you charge in alone, there's also the danger they might switch to a plan of capturing you.
Shide is also pseudo-looping... He wouldn't just stand by and let you commit suicide twice.
We'll be going as far as the shrine grounds too.
…Understood.
Can we monitor the conversation too?
How about putting it in your chest pocket on a group call?
No, ya won't be able to hear the conversation clearly.
Then we should just use a gunshot as a signal.
I see... then two shots... No, when you hear the third shot, use that as the signal to charge in.
Besides, if that person is Shide, he'll emit a shadow presence if he wears that armor.
If you sense even the slightest shadow presence, let's finish it all at once.
(Thinking back... I was trying to meet 'that person' from the very beginning.)
(The first place where I died…)
(Hitogashima Shrine--this is where it all began.)
